query:
SELECT bi.description, ROUND(bi.lineAmount, 2) AS amount, c.name AS customer
FROM billing_items bi
JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = bi.customerExternalId
WHERE bi.customerExternalId IN (
  SELECT customerExternalId FROM services WHERE provider = 'ChannelHaus'
)
AND bi.lineAmount > 0
GROUP BY bi.description, bi.lineAmount, c.name
ORDER BY amount DESC
LIMIT 15;
